description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing female figure draped in classical attire, reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary. The figure's right arm is extended outward with the hand slightly open, while the left arm rests by her side, holding a small object or fold of the garment. The hair is styled in an elaborate updo, and the facial features are serene and idealized. The drapery of the garment is intricately detailed, with folds cascading naturally down to the base. The sculpture stands on a rectangular plinth, providing stability and elevating the figure. The overall surface appears to be stone or marble, with a matte, slightly rough finish.
description: A classical-style sculpture of a standing woman in draped garments, with one arm extended and detailed hair, set on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal detail of the figure, including the extended right arm and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the outstretched right arm, and the layered drapery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the hair arrangement, and the vertical folds of the garment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the left arm resting by the side and the side profile of the figure's face and body.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
